title: ranunculus aquatilis var. calvescens
intro: Ranunculus aquatilis var. calvescens, commonly known as the small-flowered water buttercup, is a variant of the aquatic plant Ranunculus aquatilis that thrives in wet environments. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ranunculus aquatilis var. calvescens include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared as a tincture, infusion, or salve, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in herbal remedies.
